JoSAA 2026 knowledge base

Everything you need to fill JoSAA right.

Honest, plain-English guides for Indian engineering aspirants and parents — choice-filling order, float/freeze/slide, mock allotment, branch vs college, quotas, deposits, documents and scams. Built on official 2023–2026 closing-rank data.

There's no cap on JoSAA choices. The real rule: fill every option you'd genuinely join, in the right order, with a safe tail. Here's how many is enough.

Please note. BeingWise is an independent admission-help service. We are not connected to, and not approved by, JoSAA, CSAB, NTA or any government body. All predictions are estimates from past official data, for guidance only — not a promise of admission. Cutoffs, dates and rules change yearly; always check official sources (josaa.nic.in, csab.nic.in, jeemain.nta.nic.in, your state portal). Students submit and lock their own choices. © 2026 BeingWise.
